title: Frontier Queues, Visited Reservation, State Transitions, and Determinism
description: Workers share slices and maps, visited is marked after success, duplicate discoveries race, retries overwrite terminal state, and ordering changes every run. Learners cumulatively produce race-safe deterministic frontier state machine through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define discovered, rejected, queued, claimed, fetching, fetched, parsed, retryable, terminal, and canceled states with legal transitions.
Reserve admitted URL keys atomically before enqueue so concurrent discoveries cannot duplicate effects.
Use stable priority and tie keys for owner commitments, depth, page class, freshness, origin fairness, and retry readiness.
